title: ehretia indica
intro: Ehretia indica, also known as the 'Ironwood tree' or 'Ehretia', is a tropical evergreen tree native to the coastal regions of the Indian subcontinent. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ehretia indica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent cancer. Ehretia indica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, and its bark and leaves are also used to make traditional medicines and remedies.
